methods.name: CustomRevert.bubbleUpAndRevertWith
methods.desc:
@notice bubble up the revert message returned by a call and revert with a wrapped ERC-7751 error
 @dev this method can be vulnerable to revert data bombs

methods.name: BeforeSwapDeltaLibrary.getUnspecifiedDelta
methods.desc:
extracts int128 from the lower 128 bits of the BeforeSwapDelta
 returned by beforeSwap and afterSwap

methods.name: CurrencyDelta.applyDelta
NonzeroDeltaCount.decrement
methods.desc:
@notice Potential to underflow. Ensure checks are performed by integrating contracts to ensure this does not happen.
 Current usage ensures this will not happen because we call decrement with known boundaries (only up to the number of times we call increment).
